raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is on top of box_1 and attached; the top surface of box_2 is reachable by the left arm, and there is enough clearance above box_2 to apply downward stabilizing force without colliding with the table or other objects.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is held down in place, reducing motion/peeling risk while box_1 is manipulated."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both side faces of box_1 are reachable; enough lateral clearance exists around box_1 despite box_2 being on top; left arm continues stabilizing box_2 from above to prevent the attached pair from shifting during grasp acquisition.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely clamped from both sides by the two claws while box_2 remains stabilized from above (preventing slip or sudden separation)."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is firmly grasped; box_2 is still on top/attached and may move with box_1 unless stabilized during lift initiation.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 remains constrained relative to box_1 during the initial lift, minimizing unwanted rotation or peeling at the attachment."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both claws maintain a stable lateral grasp on box_1; vertical space above the boxes is sufficient to lift the combined stack (since box_2 is attached) without contacting the table or the robot body.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 (and attached box_2) is lifted off the tabletop and under full control of the robot."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is on top of box_1 and attached; the top surface of box_2 is reachable by the left arm, and there is enough clearance above box_2 to apply downward stabilizing force without colliding with the table or other objects.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is held down in place, reducing motion/peeling risk while box_1 is manipulated.

parsed_json.Precondition: Both side faces of box_1 are reachable; enough lateral clearance exists around box_1 despite box_2 being on top; left arm continues stabilizing box_2 from above to prevent the attached pair from shifting during grasp acquisition.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely clamped from both sides by the two claws while box_2 remains stabilized from above (preventing slip or sudden separation).

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is firmly grasped; box_2 is still on top/attached and may move with box_1 unless stabilized during lift initiation.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 remains constrained relative to box_1 during the initial lift, minimizing unwanted rotation or peeling at the attachment.

parsed_json.Precondition: Both claws maintain a stable lateral grasp on box_1; vertical space above the boxes is sufficient to lift the combined stack (since box_2 is attached) without contacting the table or the robot body.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 (and attached box_2) is lifted off the tabletop and under full control of the robot.
